changelog:
## What's New in v2.9.0

### MS10: Auto-Update System
- Check for new versions from the dashboard
- One-click update with automatic backup
- Rollback to previous version
- Auto-check every 24h + Telegram notification

### MS16: Licensing & Trial (v2.8.0)
- 60-day Trial Pro
- License key activation
- Feature gating (Free vs Pro)

### Other
- Project Explorer: folder size + stats bar
- Skills: only shows installed skills
- Google Sign-In mobile fix
